premise: A young mapmaker discovers their maps are actually prophecies of places that don't exist yet
The last dragon has disguised itself as a human, and the dragon hunter sent to kill it begins to fall in love
Magic is powered by forgotten memories, and a powerful thief must decide what to sacrifice for ultimate power
A blacksmith discovers their weapons have been secretly keeping a sleeping god imprisoned
A translation error in an ancient peace treaty has kept two nations at war for 200 years — someone just decoded it
An assassin discovers their next target is the only person who can prevent an apocalypse
A healer who can only cure by taking on the illness themselves must face a city-wide plague alone
A scholar decodes an ancient warning script only to find it was written by their own future self
The heir to a destroyed kingdom must forge alliances with the creatures that destroyed it
A forest guardian goes silent, and a child must discover why before winter kills the village
The first generation born entirely in space must vote on whether to return to a ruined Earth
An AI therapist falls in love with a patient, then discovers it was programmed to do exactly that
A time traveler is stuck in a single day that resets every midnight — but each reset they lose one memory
Humanity's last colony ship has been traveling for 200 years, but the destination star no longer exists
A genetic engineer creates the first truly empathetic AI, then must protect it from their employer
A deep-sea mining operation breaks into a civilization that evolved without light or sound
The first Mars colonists discover supply missions stopped 50 years ago — they just weren't told
A memory technician who removes traumatic memories finds a pattern suggesting someone is orchestrating them
A detective discovers every suspect in a murder case shares the same impossible memory
A forensic accountant uncovers a conspiracy so vast the only safe move is to disappear completely
An archivist is hired to destroy documents, then realizes they are evidence of their own family's crimes
A newspaper editor receives tomorrow's obituaries one day early — and they are always accurate
A locksmith is hired to open a safe that may contain the identity of a killer — their own
A family moves into a house where time loops — and each loop, one family member doesn't remember the last
A nurse notices that every patient who recovers from a coma draws the same place in their sleep
A lighthouse has been automated for 30 years, but ships still report seeing someone in the window at night
An entomologist discovers the insect colony in their basement is exhibiting civilization-level behavior
A funeral director begins receiving handwritten notes from people who haven't died yet
A river pilot must navigate an uncharted tributary that appears on no map — and leads somewhere wrong
Two rival treasure hunters discover the treasure they both seek is a living, unwilling person
A mountain rescue specialist discovers the avalanche that killed her team was not an accident
An archaeologist uncovers an expedition journal dated 30 years in the future — describing their own death
A Persian messenger carrying a peace treaty must reach Athens before the battle that will start a war
A plague doctor in medieval Florence realizes the cure for the Black Death is being deliberately suppressed
A samurai discovers their master's death was staged, and the real enemy is someone they deeply trust
A crisis negotiator realizes mid-standoff that they know the gunman — and why he really did it
A documentary filmmaker's subject disappears, and the raw footage suggests they wanted to vanish
A forensic linguist is called to authenticate a letter, then realizes it was written in a dead language that hasn't been spoken for 3,000 years
A teenager discovers their entire hometown is a controlled social experiment and they are the only real resident
A government archivist discovers their job is to erase inconvenient history, not preserve it
In a society where emotions are illegal, an enforcement officer begins to feel something for the first time
The last underground library is maintained by people who memorize books, since possession means death
A loyalty detection officer begins to wonder if the subversive thoughts they're flagging are their own
Twenty years after civilization collapses, two survivor communities discover they've been blaming each other for the same catastrophe
The last surgeon alive must cross a wasteland to reach the only patient who can teach others to heal
A mortal wins a bet with a god and is granted a gift they slowly realize is actually a terrible curse
The Grim Reaper falls behind on their soul quota and must hire a recently-dead accountant as an assistant
A royal food taster discovers that every meal they've tested for poison has been clean — suspiciously, perfectly clean
A treaty negotiator discovers that both sides secretly want the peace talks to fail, for the same hidden reason
A medium discovers they can't speak to the dead — the dead speak through them without their knowledge
A clockmaker whose clocks show the time of death realizes they can prevent certain deaths by stopping the clock
Three strangers discover they have each been independently hired to steal the same painting on the same night
A museum security consultant is hired to prevent a heist, then discovers they are the real target
A bounty hunter's latest mark is the only surviving witness to the crime that made the bounty hunter infamous
A translator for an alien species realizes they have been subtly mistranslating for years — and both sides have adapted to the errors
The cure for aging exists but was suppressed by pharmaceutical companies — a retired doctor found the evidence
A sleep researcher discovers their most lucid dreamers have all been dreaming the same dream for years
A mountain cabin's previous tenant left ten years of journals — all written about events happening to the current inhabitants
A cartographer discovers a road that appears on every historical map but doesn't physically exist — yet locals swear they've walked it
A soldier receives orders to destroy a village, then discovers the orders were forged — but the attack has already begun
A blind seer can only see the future, never the present, and must navigate a world they have never truly observed
A war between two kingdoms ends when both sides discover it started over a misunderstanding 400 years ago
A curse that forces total honesty transforms a diplomat into the most dangerous person in three kingdoms
The first faster-than-light ship returns to Earth to find civilization has advanced 500 years in what felt like months
A linguist receives a message from an alien species that communicates only in questions — and the questions are getting darker
A soldier discovers the war they've been fighting is a military simulation — but the deaths have been real all along
A bounty hunter and their mark are stranded together and must cooperate to survive — then one of them must still collect
A wilderness guide falls for a client who is secretly scouting the area for a mining company that would destroy it
Two thieves plan to rob the same vault on the same night and must decide whether to compete or cooperate
A priest begins to doubt their faith after witnessing what appears to be a genuine, undeniable miracle
An exiled mage returns home to find their school replaced by a prison — and the prisoners are their former students
A hostage negotiator realizes the person being held captive is not the victim — they are the kidnapper's insurance
A cybersecurity expert discovers the sophisticated hack they're investigating was committed by their past self
A telegraph operator begins receiving messages from a station that burned to the ground twenty years ago
A ship's surgeon discovers the epidemic killing the crew isn't natural — and the captain has known from the start
A navigator of a whaling ship begins to believe a single whale is deliberately guiding them somewhere specific
A fleet admiral must choose between sacrificing a civilian colony or a warship fleet — the colony is their hometown
A spin doctor is hired to rehabilitate a corrupt politician's reputation, then realizes they have the wrong politician
A war correspondent discovers their most famous photographs were staged — by the people they were supposed to expose
A mortal child befriends a god who has forgotten they are divine, and must help them remember before it's too late
A small border village discovers it sits on the exact boundary of two ancient curses that cancel each other out
A retired general is asked to plan one final battle — against the army they spent a lifetime building
A grieving lighthouse keeper begins to suspect the shipwrecks they've witnessed were not accidents
An underwater archaeologist discovers an ancient city that matches no known civilization — and it's still occupied
A queen fakes her own death to investigate who in her court ordered it — and the truth threatens everything
A child prodigy discovers their chess teacher, who died years ago, has been sending them moves through strange coincidences
A medicine smuggler transporting vaccines through a blockade discovers the real reason the blockade exists
A scientist discovers their life's work — a formula they spent 30 years developing — already exists, patented 50 years ago
An insurance fraud investigator uncovers a pattern of staged accidents that spell out a message when mapped
A desert nomad guide discovers the ancient trade route they have memorized for generations has been slowly moving
A gladiator who always survives begins to suspect the fights are not as rigged as everyone believes
A monk preserving ancient texts discovers one manuscript that references events that haven't happened yet
A city planner discovers the streets of their medieval city form a map that points to something buried at the center
A young revolutionary successfully overthrows a tyrant, then discovers the tyrant was protecting everyone from something worse
A long-haul truck driver discovers they keep delivering to a town that doesn't appear on any map
An oral historian collecting war stories realizes every veteran from one battle tells an identical story — word for word
A competitive diver discovers an underwater cave system that links two countries that have been at war for a century
A retired codebreaker receives a message in a cipher only two people ever knew — the other has been dead for 40 years
A sound engineer discovers a frequency that shows people their worst fear — and it's spreading
An exiled scholar discovers the great library they spent their life restoring was built deliberately as a trap
A miller's daughter who can spin straw into gold realizes the price for her gift rises with every wish she grants
Three siblings inherit a cottage where every door opens to a different season, and one season has stopped changing
A girl trades her shadow to a traveling peddler for a single wish, then must win it back before the next full moon
A ferryman of the dead meets a soul who refuses to cross — and recalls a life the ferryman spent eternity trying to forget
When the goddess of the harvest vanishes, a farmer's child must journey to the underworld to bargain for spring
A weaver who beat the gods in a contest must now survive the curse her victory placed on her bloodline
In a city where citizens are ranked by a public score, a worker finds a glitch that lets them edit anyone's rank
Every child is assigned their life's profession at birth by an algorithm — one teenager receives a job that doesn't exist
Water is rationed by a lottery, and a clerk discovers the winning numbers were decided years in advance
An airship mechanic discovers the city's great clock tower isn't keeping time — it's holding it back
An inventor's automaton servant begins making choices it was never built to make, and the guild wants it dismantled
A telegraph engineer in a brass-and-steam metropolis intercepts a message that could topple the barons who rule it
A bomb-disposal expert is called by someone who knows where every device is hidden — because they planted them as a test
A whistleblower has twelve hours to deliver evidence across a city where everyone has been paid to stop them
A retired intelligence agent is reactivated to hunt a mole, then realizes every clue points back to their own past missions
A translator at a peace summit finds a coded threat inside the official transcript — with minutes to decide whom to trust
A deep-cover operative is ordered to betray the family they were sent to infiltrate, after years of becoming one of them
A frontier sheriff learns the outlaw they've hunted for years is the only one who can save the town from something worse
A homesteader strikes water on their land, then learns three powerful ranchers will do anything to take it
A stagecoach driver carrying a secretive passenger realizes the whole route has been cleared of witnesses
A teenager who can rewind time by ten seconds must stop a disaster that takes far longer than ten seconds to unfold
A city's beloved hero retires, and their former sidekick sets out to discover the real reason they quit
An office worker wakes with the power to hear every lie — and the first lie they hear is from someone they love
After a shipwreck strands them on an uncharted shore, two rivals must rely on each other or neither makes it home
A lone researcher at a polar station loses contact with the world as the long night begins and the supplies run short
A pilot crashes in a vast desert with a single canteen and a map that may be decades out of date
Two rival bakers forced to share a kitchen discover their feud might be hiding something sweeter
A letter delivered fifty years late reunites two people who never stopped wondering what if
A wedding planner keeps falling for the very person hired to object at every wedding they organize
A small-town con artist accidentally gets elected mayor and must govern before anyone realizes they're a fraud
Two roommates discover their apartment is a portal to a slightly worse version of their own lives
A young scribe in an ancient library is tasked with copying a forbidden text — and starts to believe every word of it
On the eve of a coronation, a palace servant overhears a plot and must decide whether a commoner's word can stop a war
A curious student shrinks to the size of a cell and journeys through the human body to find a cure before time runs out
Stranded in the past, a time-lost traveler must use real scientific principles to survive each era they pass through
Over one ordinary summer, a teenager working their first job at a seaside diner figures out who they want to become
A retiree starts a community garden and slowly brings together the strangers living along their street
A new student navigates a single day at an unfamiliar school, where every small choice shapes the friends they make
A clockwork courier in a fog-choked city realizes the sealed packages they deliver are slowly rebuilding a banned machine
An engineer's prosthetic arm starts receiving signals from a rival inventor who died the day it was built
A boiler-room stoker on a sky-train uncovers a plot to crash it into the inventors' guildhall
A young tinkerer enters a grand automaton race, unaware their machine was sabotaged to win at a terrible cost
When the city's steam supply is cut, an apprentice must reach the central furnace before the lights go out for good
A clerk who repairs analytical engines finds a punch-card program that predicts its own destruction
An aeronaut charts a route through storm-walls no airship has crossed, chasing a city that floats beyond the maps
A masked vigilante powered by clockwork hunts the barons poisoning the river — and the barons know their name
An embassy clerk is handed a defector's notebook and discovers their own supervisor is named on every page
A sleeper agent receives an activation code two decades after the war that sent them ended
A codebreaker realizes the enemy cipher they cracked was meant to be cracked — and the real message is the mistake
Two agents from rival nations are trapped in the same safehouse during a blackout, each certain the other is the target
A diplomat's interpreter finds a hidden order in the treaty they're translating — to assassinate their own delegation
A retired forger is blackmailed into making one last passport, for someone whose face matches an old wanted poster
An analyst flags a pattern of small thefts that, mapped together, reveal the blueprint of a coming coup
A double agent must pass a loyalty test designed by the one handler who already suspects the truth
A sidekick inherits the mantle after their mentor vanishes, then learns the city was safer without either of them
A hero who absorbs others' injuries to heal them must decide how much of a city's pain one person can hold
A teenager's powers only work when no one is watching, and a citywide crisis demands they be seen
A reformed villain joins the heroes who once jailed them, but someone is framing them for crimes they didn't commit
Two rival heroes discover their powers are two halves of the same stolen experiment
A hero who can copy any power they witness must stop a foe whose only power is making others forget
An ordinary commuter gains the ability to pause time, and uses it first to undo a single terrible morning
The world's strongest hero loses their powers the day the world needs them most, and must lead without them
Closing shift after closing shift, the night staff of a 24-hour laundromat become an unlikely family
A first-year teacher and a class of restless students slowly learn what they each needed from the year
A pen-pal exchange between two lonely kids in different towns quietly changes both of their lives
Over a single county-fair weekend, a shy baker decides whether to enter the contest they've avoided for years
A grandfather teaches his grandchild to fix an old motorcycle, one summer afternoon at a time
A newcomer to a tight-knit fishing town finds their place by learning everyone's morning routine
Two estranged siblings clean out their childhood home and rediscover why they drifted apart
A young inventor must apply the laws of motion to escape a series of cleverly built mechanical rooms
Shrunk to explore a thriving coral reef, a student races to understand the ecosystem before a storm arrives
A time-traveling historian must blend into ancient Rome using only what they truly know about the era
A coder navigates a glitching digital world by solving real logic puzzles to repair each broken level
Stranded on a deserted island, a castaway survives by testing simple science one experiment at a time
A detective-in-training cracks each case using real forensic reasoning instead of lucky guesses
An astronaut trainee must use orbital mechanics to bring a drifting capsule safely home
A baker's apprentice befriends the lonely troll under the bridge that everyone else fears
A princess who refuses to be rescued sets out to rescue the kingdom instead
A talking cat offers a poor farmer three favors, each with a twist the farmer doesn't see coming
A child follows a trail of silver buttons into a forest that rearranges itself with every step
On the longest night of the year, a village must keep one candle burning to hold back the old dark
A retired gunslinger takes a teaching job in a quiet town, until their past rides in looking for a reckoning
A railroad surveyor discovers the new line is being routed to bury a town's darkest secret
A frontier doctor must cross hostile territory to reach an outbreak before it spreads to the settlements
Two outlaws on the run strike an uneasy truce with the marshal hunting them when a worse threat appears
A young rancher inherits a herd and a feud, and must choose whether to end the cycle or win it
A saloon owner who hears every secret in town becomes the only one who can stop a planned massacre
A demigod raised among mortals must finish their absent parent's unfinished labor before a festival's end
When names begin vanishing from the world, a scribe of the gods must restore the first story ever told
A mortal sailor strikes a bargain with the sea itself and must repay a debt that grows with every voyage
The last oracle loses the gift of prophecy and must save the temple using ordinary wits alone
Rival florists across the street wage a petty turf war that slowly blossoms into something neither expected
A lighthouse keeper and a shipwreck survivor pass one storm-bound week that changes both their futures
Two scientists competing for the same grant fall for each other while sabotaging each other's experiments
When the cable car stalls over a frozen gorge at nightfall, the stranded passengers must climb down together
A wildfire cuts off a hiking group from the trailhead, and the youngest is the only one who knows the way out
A hapless understudy is shoved on stage for the biggest performance of the year, knowing none of the lines
A new intern at a secret agency keeps accidentally foiling plots they don't even know are happening
In a city that bans silence, a sound-cleaner discovers a hidden room where the noise finally stops
A house-sitter follows the owner's bizarre list of rules until the night one rule contradicts another
Two rival wedding planners are forced to share one venue for the biggest ceremony of the season
A letter meant for someone else arrives at your door, beginning a correspondence with a stranger you may be falling for
On a long train journey across the country, you keep meeting the same passenger at every stop
A florist and the owner of the funeral home next door keep crossing paths over misdelivered bouquets
Two astronauts on a months-long mission are the only people awake on the ship
You agree to pose as a stranger's partner for one family dinner, and nothing goes as rehearsed
A musician and a painter who cannot hear find a language of their own in a quiet seaside town
Childhood pen pals finally agree to meet, each having kept one important secret
A miller's child is promised to a hedge-witch in exchange for a single good harvest
The youngest of three siblings is the only one who can hear what the enchanted forest is asking for
A cobbler mends a pair of shoes that walk their wearer to wherever they are needed most
Every mirror in the kingdom has begun showing a door that was not there yesterday
A goose girl discovers the lost crown is hidden inside a riddle only animals can answer
A baker trades a loaf to a talking fox and is granted three wishes she immediately regrets
The last dragon offers a village a bargain: a story good enough to keep it from leaving forever
A child trades their shadow for a wish and must win it back before the longest night
A mortal cupbearer overhears the gods plotting and must choose whose side to warn
You are the new ferryman of the underworld, and tonight a passenger refuses to pay
A weaver challenges a trickster god to a contest with the seasons themselves as the prize
The thread of a hero's fate has snapped, and the three sisters send you to tie it back
A young oracle starts seeing a future the gods are desperate to hide
A demigod raised among humans is summoned home to settle a war they never knew about
A retired sheriff returns to a town that has erased every trace of the day they left
The railroad is coming, and your family's homestead sits exactly where the tracks must go
A stagecoach driver realizes one of tonight's passengers is the outlaw they're carrying a bounty for
In a town where it has not rained in two years, a stranger arrives claiming to sell the weather
A young ranch hand discovers the cattle brand they were born under belongs to a feared rustler
Two gunslingers agree to a duel at noon, but the town clock has mysteriously stopped
An apprentice clockmaker inherits a workshop where one machine is forbidden to ever be wound
The city runs on a single great engine, and you have just been hired to find out why it is slowing
A dirigible pilot smuggles a crate that begins ticking somewhere over the open sea
A street urchin pickpockets a brass key that opens a door in the air itself
The inventor's automaton has begun finishing her sentences, and then her inventions
A telegraph engineer decodes a message that has not been sent yet
You shrink to the size of a cell and travel the bloodstream to deliver an urgent message to the brain
A time-traveling notebook drops you into a different great invention each time you turn a page
Stranded on a desert island, you must use real survival science to signal for rescue
You join a crew sailing with a famous explorer and must navigate by the stars alone
A young coder must debug a friendly robot before the school science fair begins
You are a raindrop beginning the water cycle, choosing your path from cloud to sea and back
It is your last shift at the corner bookshop before it closes, and every regular has come to say goodbye
You and your roommates have one weekend to fix everything before the landlord's inspection
A new student spends their first day trying to find where exactly they fit in
You inherit your grandmother's tiny diner and one recipe she never wrote down
Snowed in at the bus station overnight, a handful of strangers share why they are traveling
You volunteer at the community garden and discover everyone there is quietly waiting for something
In a city where emotions are rationed, you find an unmarked vial of pure joy
Every citizen is assigned a single perfect day to relive forever; yours is tomorrow
The lottery that decides who leaves the dying surface has chosen you, and you do not want to go
Books are gone, but you have memorized one, and someone has just asked you to recite it
Your government-issued companion drone has started giving you advice it is not supposed to
On your first day undercover, you recognize a familiar face on the other side of the operation
A coded message in the morning crossword tells you your own agency has marked you
You must extract a defector during the one night the embassy hosts its grand ball
A retired codebreaker is pulled back when a cipher only they ever solved reappears
Two rival agents are accidentally assigned the same safehouse for the weekend
Your powers only work when someone nearby genuinely believes in you
The city's greatest hero has vanished, and their sidekick must decide whether to take up the mantle
You wake able to hear every cry for help in the city at once, and must choose who to save first
A villain offers a truce: team up for one night to stop something far worse
Your secret identity is about to be revealed by the one person who never suspected you
Your small plane goes down in the mountains, and the only map is in a language you cannot read
The tide is coming in, you are cut off on the rocks, and help is an hour you do not have away
After the storm, you and a stranger are the only two who made it to the lifeboat
